recommendations.title: Making a Living
recommendations.overview: A swindler scams a newspaper reporter-photographer and then, not realizing where the man is employed, applies for a job at his newspaper.

recommendations.title: Badhaai Ho
recommendations.overview: A 25-year-old man tries to suppress his embarrassment when his mother announces that she is pregnant.

recommendations.title: Bad Boys
recommendations.overview: Marcus Burnett is a henpecked family man. Mike Lowrey is a footloose and fancy free ladies' man. Both Miami policemen, they have 72 hours to reclaim a consignment of drugs stolen from under their station's nose. To complicate matters, in order to get

recommendations.title: Butterflies
recommendations.overview: Three strangers with one thing in common — the same father — come to a Turkish village to bury him, and learn about him and each other.

recommendations.title: Inconceivable
recommendations.overview: A mother looks to escape her abusive past by moving to a new town where she befriends another mother, who grows suspicious of her.

recommendations.title: Killer Heat
recommendations.overview: An expat PI is hired to investigate a suspicious death in Crete, Greece, where jealousies run deep amongst the victim's powerful family.

recommendations.title: Run
recommendations.overview: Chloe, a teenager who is confined to a wheelchair, is homeschooled by her mother, Diane. Chloe soon becomes suspicious of her mother and begins to suspect that she may be harboring a dark secret.

recommendations.title: A Love Song for Bobby Long
recommendations.overview: A headstrong young woman returns to New Orleans after the death of her estranged mother.

recommendations.title: Stranger on the Third Floor
recommendations.overview: Newspaper reporter Michael Ward plunges into a nightmare of guilt, fearing that his "evidence" has sentenced the wrong man to death.

recommendations.title: Taste of Cherry
